allow: PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"acme@example.com","password":"acme123"}' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $login.token; Write-Host "Logged in as: $\($login.company.name\)"; $analysis = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/analysis" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Monthly cost: $\($analysis.currency\) $\($analysis.totalMonthlyCost\)"; Write-Host "Potential saving: $\($analysis.currency\) $\($analysis.totalPotentialSaving\)"; Write-Host "Recommendations: $\($analysis.recommendations.Count\)"; Write-Host "CO2 footprint: $\($analysis.totalCo2TonsMonth\) t/mo")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"acme@example.com","password":"acme123"}' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $login.token; $pdf = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/reports/pdf" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "PDF status: $\($pdf.StatusCode\), size: $\($pdf.RawContentLength\) bytes, type: $\($pdf.Headers.'Content-Type'\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"acme@example.com","password":"acme123"}' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $login.token; try { $pdf = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/reports/pdf" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "PDF OK: $\($pdf.RawContentLength\) bytes, Content-Type: $\($pdf.Headers.'Content-Type'\)" } catch { Write-Host "PDF ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"acme@example.com","password":"acme123"}' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $login.token; Write-Host "Login OK: $\($login.company.name\)"; $a = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/analysis" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Monthly cost: $\($a.currency\) $\([math]::Round\($a.totalMonthlyCost,2\)\)"; Write-Host "Potential saving: $\($a.currency\) $\([math]::Round\($a.totalPotentialSaving,2\)\) \($\([math]::Round\($a.totalPotentialSavingPercent,1\)\)%\)"; Write-Host "Recommendations: $\($a.recommendations.Count\)"; Write-Host "CO2 footprint: $\([math]::Round\($a.totalCo2TonsMonth,3\)\) t/mo")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/health" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content; Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"acme@example.com","password":"acme123"}' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $login.token; $checkout = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/billing/checkout" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Body '{"plan":"growth"}' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Start-Process $checkout.url)
